title: tulipa clusiana var. chrysantha
intro: Tulipa clusiana var. chrysantha, also known as the Golden Lady Tulip, is a variety of the Clusiana Tulip, a species of flowering plant in the lily family, native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Pyrenees. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a remedy for fever reduction and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tulipa clusiana var. chrysantha include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe colds and flu, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
